steps.title: Turn percent growth into a multiplier
steps.content:
A $6\%$ increase means each month keeps $100\%$ of the previous total and adds $6\%$ more:
$$100\%+6\%=106\%=1.06$$

steps.title: Build the exponential model
steps.content:
The starting value is $1{,}500$, and the multiplier $1.06$ is applied once for each month $m$:
$$c=1{,}500(1.06)^m$$
The answer is B.
